## Executive Summary
JPMorgan Chase reports net income of $57.0B on revenue of $182.4B for FY2025, with diluted EPS of $20.05. Revenue reached $182.4B, net income $57.0B, and diluted EPS $20.05 for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2025.; Net margin stood at 31.3% for the period.; Prior-period comparative figures are not available in the provided data.
